hero.title: Shaping Tomorrow with
hero.description: Where AI doesn't just watch, it acts, asks, and evolves with you. Join TMA in leading the intelligent future. At Agentic Vision, we believe AI should do more than just observe. Our intelligent systems take control, analyze outcomes, ask the right questions, and evolve with every action you take.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Our AI-powered multi-camera tracking system provides advanced surveillance and monitoring capabilities. Track objects and people across multiple camera feeds with real-time analytics and intelligent detection.

features.title: Key Features
list: Real-time object and person tracking across multiple cameras

layout.title: Camera Layout
layout.description: Select the number of cameras to display

services.title: Our AI Services
services.subtitle: Discover how our AI-powered solutions can transform your business operations and create new opportunities for growth and innovation.

camera-tracking.title: AI Multi-camera Tracking
camera-tracking.description: Advanced real-time tracking system for monitoring and analyzing multiple camera feeds simultaneously.

vision-asking.title: Vision Asking
vision-asking.description: A smart feature that lets you chat directly with AI to grasp everything happening on your camera screens.

data-analytics.title: Data Analytics
data-analytics.description: Extract meaningful insights from your data with our AI-powered analytics solutions.

voice-recognition.title: Voice Recognition
voice-recognition.description: Convert speech to text with high accuracy across multiple languages and accents.

video-processing.title: Video Processing
video-processing.description: Analyze, generate, and enhance video content with our powerful video AI capabilities.

predictive-modeling.title: Predictive Modeling
predictive-modeling.description: Forecast trends and outcomes using our advanced predictive algorithms and time-series analysis.
